title: vitex quinata var. puberula
intro: Vitex quinata var. puberula is a variety of the Vitex quinata plant, also known as the five-leaf chaste tree or Chinese chaste tree, a flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Vitex quinata var. puberula include relieving menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Vitex quinata var. puberula can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
